signatures.name: Velvet Cold Brew
signatures.description: Slow-steeped 18-hour cold brew, silky smooth with a hint of dark chocolate.

signatures.name: Caramel Whisper Latte
signatures.description: House-pulled espresso swirled with handmade caramel and steamed milk.

signatures.name: Midnight Espresso
signatures.description: Double-shot single-origin espresso — bold, unapologetic, unforgettable.

signatures.name: Hazelnut Dream Cappuccino
signatures.description: Velvety foam kissed with roasted hazelnut and a dusting of cocoa.

signatures.name: Rose Cardamom Latte
signatures.description: An aromatic Indian-inspired latte with rose syrup and fresh cardamom.

signatures.name: Banta Masala Soda
signatures.description: Diggin's legendary mint lemonade — fizzy, tangy, and absolutely addictive.

coolers.name: Sunset Citrus Iced Tea
coolers.description: Blood orange and passion fruit iced tea that tastes like golden hour.

coolers.name: Berry Blush Smoothie
coolers.description: Mixed berries blended thick with Greek yogurt and a honey drizzle.

coolers.name: Mango Tango Cooler
coolers.description: Alphonso mango puree shaken with lime, mint, and crushed ice.

coolers.name: Matcha Zen Latte
coolers.description: Ceremonial-grade Japanese matcha whisked with oat milk over ice.

coolers.name: Classic Oreo Shake
coolers.description: Thick, creamy, loaded with crushed Oreos — a Diggin cult classic.

pasta.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
pasta.description: Creamy egg-based sauce with crispy pancetta — the Roman original.

pasta.name: Garden Herb Penne
pasta.description: Fresh basil, thyme, and roasted garlic tossed in olive oil and parmesan.

pasta.name: Baked Penne Arrabbiata
pasta.description: Fiery tomato sauce with chili flakes, baked under a golden cheese crust.

pasta.name: Truffle Mushroom Ravioli
pasta.description: Handmade ravioli stuffed with wild mushrooms and black truffle oil.

pasta.name: Seashell Pesto Pasta
pasta.description: Conchiglie shells coated in house-made basil pesto with toasted pine nuts.

pizza.name: Margherita Classica
pizza.description: San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, basil — stone-baked perfection.

pizza.name: Wild Mushroom & Feta
pizza.description: Roasted forest mushrooms with crumbled feta and rosemary-infused oil.

pizza.name: Four Cheese Pizza
pizza.description: Mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, gruyère — melted to golden bliss.

pizza.name: Pepperoni Fuoco
pizza.description: Spicy pepperoni, jalapeños, mozzarella, and a drizzle of chili oil.

starters.name: Truffle Fries
starters.description: Hand-cut fries tossed in truffle oil with parmesan and fresh herbs.

starters.name: Mushroom Bruschetta
starters.description: Toasted ciabatta topped with sautéed wild mushrooms and aged balsamic.

starters.name: Cheesy Jalapeño Poppers
starters.description: Cream cheese-stuffed jalapeños, golden-fried to crunchy perfection.

starters.name: Garlic Cheese Bread
starters.description: Warm sourdough brushed with roasted garlic butter and melted cheese.

desserts.name: Lotus Biscoff Cheesecake
desserts.description: Creamy cheesecake on a Biscoff crust, drizzled with caramelized cookie butter.

desserts.name: Tiramisu Royale
desserts.description: Layers of espresso-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone — Italian heaven.

desserts.name: Crème Brûlée
desserts.description: Custard with a coffee twist and a torched sugar crown. Pure indulgence.

desserts.name: Molten Lava Cake
desserts.description: Warm dark chocolate cake with a gooey, flowing center. Served with gelato.

desserts.name: Apple Crumble
desserts.description: Warm cinnamon-spiced apples under a buttery oat crumble with vanilla cream.
